CVE-2017-11548.title: The _tokenize_matrix function in audio_out.c in Xiph.Org libao 1. ...
CVE-2017-11548.summary: The _tokenize_matrix function in audio_out.c in Xiph.Org libao 1.2.0 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (memory corruption) via a crafted MP3 file.
